title: Applicants from other states; waiver of inspection
doc_html:
§3473. Applicants from other states; waiver of inspection

            The board may waive the inspection provided in R.S. 37:3470, if the applicant presents to the board a satisfactory certificate of registration or license from an entity which licenses distributors of the same type in another state, and if the standards adopted and enforced by such entity are comparable to those provided in this Chapter.

            Acts 1988, No. 852, §1; Acts 1995, No. 1152, §1, eff. June 29, 1995; Acts 2008, No. 597, §1; Acts 2015, No. 443, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
doc_text:
§3473.  Applicants from other states; waiver of inspection
The board may waive the inspection provided in R.S. 37:3470, if the applicant
presents to the board a satisfactory certificate of registration or license from an entity which
licenses distributors of the same type in another state, and if the standards adopted and
enforced by such entity are comparable to those provided in this Chapter.
Acts 1988, No. 852, §1; Acts 1995, No. 1152, §1, eff. June 29, 1995; Acts 2008, No.
597, §1; Acts 2015, No. 443, §1, eff. July 1, 2015.
